Action to create a trip

-Create New Trip
    - Option 1: Start from scratch.
    - Option 2: Use a saved template.
    - Option 3: Copy existing trip.
- Trip Setup
    - Trip title (Spain & Scotland – Mitchell).
    - Cover images (upload/select).
    - Trip description / overview.
    - Duration, dates, group size.
    - customer (dropdown)
- Trip Sections (must mirror proposal structure) - add as tabs?
    - Trip Overview.
    - Daily Journey (day-by-day itinerary).
    - Championship Golf Courses.
    - Luxury Accommodations.
    - Map of journey.
    - Additional Information (expandable sections).
    - Pricing & Payment.
    - FAQs.
- Flexible Content Blocks
    - Ability to hide/reorder sections.
    - Rich text editor for descriptions.
    - Media gallery (images, videos).
    - Ability to preview proposal
